keywords: status check ORDER 1 lock ORDER 2 billing cycle DPO conflict FLOW-09 inversion cancelled subscription InvoiceVoided getStatus lock acquisition
ironRules: getStatus() at ORDER 1 — BEFORE lock acquisition at ORDER 2
CANCELLED or PAUSED subscription: return InvoiceVoided immediately, do NOT acquire lock
DPO conflict: conflictsWith FLOW-09-T107-seat-before-payment (inverted ordering — both domain-correct)
Lock acquisition without prior status check consumes a billing lock slot for an ineligible subscription
